pages.text: On a very hot day, on a holiday day, we go to the beach. To the sea. We go to the sea, my family and me.

blocks.text: On a very hot day, on a holiday day, we go to the beach. To the sea. We go to the sea, my family and me.

pages.text: On the edge of the sand is the water. That’s where my toes touch the sea.

blocks.text: On the edge of the sand is the water. That’s where my toes touch the sea.

pages.text: The waves play a game. They say yes, I say no. They run up to meet me, and I run from the sea.

blocks.text: The waves play a game. They say yes, I say no. They run up to meet me, and I run from the sea.

pages.text: They say no, I say yes. I run back to the edge. I chase the waves home to the sea.

blocks.text: They say no, I say yes. I run back to the edge. I chase the waves home to the sea.

pages.text: They say yes, I say no. They say no, I say yes. The sea chases me, and I chase the sea.

blocks.text: They say yes, I say no. They say no, I say yes. The sea chases me, and I chase the sea.

pages.text: There is blue. There is sea spray. In the game, I can’t be still.

blocks.text: There is blue. There is sea spray. In the game, I can’t be still.

pages.text: A chasing wave brings me a shell. It leaves it for me on the wet sand.

blocks.text: A chasing wave brings me a shell. It leaves it for me on the wet sand.

pages.text: I find a feather in the dry sand, and I send it on a wave to the sea.

blocks.text: I find a feather in the dry sand, and I send it on a wave to the sea.

pages.text: Then the waves say yes, and I say yes too.

blocks.text: Then the waves say yes, and I say yes too.

pages.text: I have sea and sand in my toes.

blocks.text: I have sea and sand in my toes.
